title: Aircraft Part
description: An Aircraft Part is a type of item that is used as a component to assemble Aircraft.

title: Ammunition
description: Ammunition is used by Weapons, Vehicles, and player manned defenses. Garrisoned defenses do not need ammunition. Each ammo type may or may not stack in player's inventory depending on their uniform, and in vehicle or structure's inventory depending on their type.

title: Anti-Tank Rifle
description: Anti-Tank Rifles (abbreviated as ATR) are a class of anti-tank firearms that fire 14.5mm ammunition.

title: Armour Uniform
description: The Armour Uniform is a type of uniform designed to give the wearer additional protection against enemy fire at the cost of additional weight.

title: Assembly Materials
description: Assembly Materials are a special class of advanced materials that are crafted and used in Facilities.

title: Bandages/it
description:
NOTA

A causa della mancanza della localizzazione italiana del gioco, si è deciso di abbinare fra parentesi i termini importanti in lingua originale in modo da avere un riferimento chiaro con i termini usati in gioco. 

 
Le Bende sono un oggetto medico usate per fermare il sanguinamento (bleeding) su se stessi e funge da munizione per il Kit di Primo Soccorso (First Aid Kit).

title: Emplaced Heavy Artillery
description: The Emplaced Heavy Artillery is a class of emplacement utilizing 150mm ammuniton, ideal for seiging down concrete. These weapons serve a notable benchmark for the beginning of late war.

title: Engineer Uniform
description: The Engineer Uniform is a type of Uniform that designed to reduce the Weight of certain construction and facility materials, aiding the wearer in various construction roles.

title: Extra Large Item
description: An Extra Large Item is an item so massive that it cannot be held by the Player, does not fit in any inventory, and can only be in stockpiles.

title: Flamethrower
description: Flamethrowers are a type of handheld weapon that shoot flames instead of bullets. Unlike other infantry weapons, it does not have an internal ammo count.

title: Flamethrower Ammo
description: Flamethrower Ammo is a type of ammunition specifically used by Flamethrowers.

title: Grenade Launcher
description:
Grenade Launchers are infantry weapons designed to fire a variety of grenade types over a long distance.
Unlike throwing grenades by hand, launched grenades cannot be cooked, and will always detonate 4s after being launched.
When they are equipped, pressing  cycles through grenade types in your inventory.

title: Heavy Artillery
description: Heavy Artillery is a class of Emplaced Weapons that fire 150mm shells at long ranges. Unlike most Emplacements, they are not invisible at night and cannot be hidden inside large bushes.

title: Items
description: Items are objects in the game that can be picked up and carried by Players in their inventory.

title: Large Item
description: A Large Item is an item so large that it does not fit in a backpack and the Player can only carry one at a time, preventing them from using their equipment. It is placed in a dedicated "Large Item" slot (#8) in the inventory and is visible in the hands of the soldier carrying them. It does not stack in inventory slots.

title: Light Machine Gun
description: Light Machine Guns (abbreviated as LMG) are a class of firearms that fire 12.7mm ammunition.

title: Materials
description: Materials are items used to produce equipment and to construct, refuel, and repair Vehicles and Structures. Most are stored under the  section of Stockpiles. They can be categorized in three main groups: Raw Materials, Refined Materials and Large Materials.

title: Medic Uniform
description: The Medic Uniform is a type of Uniform specially designed for frontline Medics, reducing the weight of medical equipment, and being able to stack medical supplies.

title: Medical
description: Medical items are related to the Player's Health or Respawning. They are listed in the "Medical"  category in stockpiles. They are produced at Factories in the "Medical"  category except Critically Wounded Soldiers which are spawned by dying Wounded Players.

title: Melee Weapon
description: Melee Weapons are a class of infantry weapons used in close quarters.

title: Mounted Anti-Tank RPG
description: Mounted Anti-Tank RPGs are a class of mounted anti-tank launchers that fire ARC/RPG ammunition.

title: Mounted Anti-Tank Rifle
description: Mounted Anti-Tank Rifles (or MATR) are a class of anti-tank Mounted Weapons that fire 14.5mm ammunition.

title: Mounted Equipment
description: Mounted Equipments are a class of large utility items that must be mounted on a Deployed Tripod in order to be used. Unlike Mounted Weapons they cannot be mounted on any vehicle.

title: Mounted Grenade Launcher
description: Mounted Grenade Launchers are a class of Mounted Weapons that fire certain types of grenades.

title: Mounted Infantry Support Gun
description: Mounted Infantry Support Guns (or ISG) are a class of Mounted Weapons that fire 30mm ammunition.

title: Mounted RPG Launcher
description: Mounted RPG Launchers are a class of Mounted Weapons that fire RPG ammunition.

title: Mounted Weapons
description: Mounted Weapons, or Tripod Weapons, are a class of large heavy weapons that must be placed on a mount (either a Deployed Tripod, certain vehicles, or certain structures) in order to be fired.

title: Niska Mk. I Gun Motor Carriage
Officer Uniform
description:
The Officer Uniform is a type of uniform whose only purpose is to allow you to freely teamkill members of your own Regiment without any repercussions. The only two ammo types that stack in the uniform are 8mm and .44 Mag (3 per slot).
This allows any player with this on to act like a "commissar" for their regiment. The uniform has 6 inventory slots, which limits the amount of equipment the player can hold in combat.

title: Paratrooper Uniform
description: The Paratrooper Uniform is an expensive type of Uniform that allows players to do paradrop missions by wearing a Paratrooper's Ruck.

title: Pistol
description: Pistols are small, secondary weapons designed to give the player a self-defense weapon in case they are not carrying a primary weapon. Useful for roles that use a different item in the primary slot, such as Medics and Combat Vehicle Crews.

title: RPG Launcher
description: RPG Launchers (or simply RPGs) are a class of infantry heavy weapons that fire RPGs as ammunition.

title: Rare Resource Node
description: The Rare Resource Node is a harvestable node that yields Wreckage and randomly spawns across the map rather than on Resource Fields

title: Resource Field
description: Resource Fields are locations in the world where Players can harvest large amounts of raw resources. Unlike World Resource Mines, Resource Fields must be manually harvested using various pieces of equipment.

title: Resource Harvester
description: Resource Harvesters are logistical structures that automatically gather one type of resource. Most require fuel to work.

title: Revolver
description: Revolvers are a class of semi-automatic seconday weapons that fire .44 Mag ammunition.

title: Scout Uniform
description: The Scout Uniform is a type of Uniform that's designed to give the wearer a higher chance of not being detected on the map. It is useful for scouting enemy positions, either for partisan activities, or gathering intel of enemy defenses.

title: Secondary Equipment
description: Secondary Equipment are items that fit in the player's secondary slot (press  to draw).

title: Secondary Weapons
description:
Secondary Weapons are Weapons that fit in the secondary equipment slot (press  to draw).
They include:

title: Shotgun
description: Shotguns are a class of close-range firearms that uses Buckshot shells as ammunition.

title: Snow Uniform
description: The Snow Uniform is a type of Uniform specially designed to protect the wearer during Snow Storms. Depending on the uniform it will give a varying degree of protection against the cold, prolonging the exposure the wearer can face before freezing to death.

title: Soldier Uniform
description: The Soldier Uniform is the standard uniform for soldiers. It is primarily used in infantry combat, but can be used in all types of roles.

title: Stationary Harvester
description: Stationary Harvesters are player-built structures that automatically gather resources when given fuel. They are built with a Construction Vehicle and can only be built next to a Resource Field (max 3 per field).

title: Tank Uniform
description: The Tank Uniform is a type of Uniform that is specially designed to aid vehicle crews in combat, allowing the vehicle and their crew to stay in combat for much longer.

title: Uniforms
description: Uniforms are an equippable item that allows the player to specialize in a type of role, giving them buffs, and allowing the player to do better in certain roles. Unlike other pieces of equipment, the player wears it at all time, and can only swap uniforms and not fully removed them.

title: Utility
description: Utility items are tools and equipments that help you in the war. They are found in the "Utility"  section of stockpiles. Most of them are produced at Factories.

title: Weapons
description: Foxhole features a wide variety of weapons for player soldiers to use with the right ammunition.

title: Weapons/zh
description: Foxhole features a wide variety of weapons for player soldiers to use with the right ammunition.
